spec.query: SELECT last("b_run") FROM "miza_realtime" WHERE ("machine"::tag =~ /^$machine$/ AND "name"::tag = 'Trạng thái động cơ') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "name"::tag fill(null)
